name: Enhanced Annual Exclusion for Non-Citizen Spouses

eligibility.description: Applies to gifts that would otherwise qualify for the marital deduction if the spouse were a U.S. citizen.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Increases the annual gift tax exclusion (to $100,000, adjusted for inflation) for gifts to a spouse who is not a U.S. citizen, since the unlimited marital deduction does not apply.
